channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK joins EU pledge to make it easier to deport migrants in bid to curb illegal crossings
item.description: UK joins EU pledge to make it easier to deport migrants in bid to curb illegal crossings

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Ian always great value. A sign of how lost some people on this website are that they are salivating at the prospect of what would be a catastrophic sign for the Labour party…because Andy Burnham is a threat to St Keir.
item.description: Ian always great value. A sign of how lost some people on this website are that they are salivating at the prospect of what would be a catastrophic sign for the Labour party…because Andy Burnham is a threat to St Keir.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM
item.description: Burnham makes move to take on Starmer after MP stands down so he can challenge PM

item.title: The Times: Keir Starmer ‘won’t block Andy Burnham from Commons return’ — as it happened - The Times
item.description: Keir Starmer ‘won’t block Andy Burnham from Commons return’ — as it happened - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: New Health Secretary named after Streeting resignation sparks potential Labour leadership contest
item.description: New Health Secretary named after Streeting resignation sparks potential Labour leadership contest

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting’s resignation letter – what he said and what he meant - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting’s resignation letter – what he said and what he meant - The Guardian

item.title: BBC Politics: Watch: The day Labour's potential leadership race began to heat up
item.description: Watch: The day Labour's potential leadership race began to heat up

item.title: The Guardian: Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’ - The Guardian
item.description: Streeting in standoff with No 10 as allies claim ‘things are shifting’ - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: What was HMRC’s investigation into Angela Rayner’s tax affairs all about? - The Guardian
item.description: What was HMRC’s investigation into Angela Rayner’s tax affairs all about? - The Guardian

item.title: ITVX: Downing Street will not block Burnham's bid to return to Commons - ITVX
item.description: Downing Street will not block Burnham's bid to return to Commons - ITVX
